# Pivot Plumbing

> Family-owned, licensed master plumbing company based in Flour Bluff (Corpus Christi), Texas, serving the Coastal Bend. Owner Chad Icke is a Texas Licensed Master Plumber (RMP-43866). Residential and commercial plumbing — repairs, water heaters, gas lines, drains and sewer, bathroom and kitchen remodels. Not a franchise or call center: the owner answers the phone and does the work.

## Key facts

- Business: Pivot Plumbing LLC ("A Movement In Plumbing")
- Owner: Chad Icke, Texas Licensed Master Plumber, license RMP-43866, fully insured
- Phone (call or text): (361) 460-2929
- Email: fulcrum@pivotplumbing.biz
- Based in: Flour Bluff, Corpus Christi, TX
- Service area: Flour Bluff, Corpus Christi, Portland, South Padre Island, Padre & Mustang Island, and the surrounding Coastal Bend, Texas
- Hours: Monday-Saturday; after-hours calls welcome when the owner is available
- After-hours rates: $201 for the first hour, then $100.50 per additional 30 minutes (standard rates during business hours; upfront pricing before work starts)
- BBB rating: A+ (Better Business Bureau, Corpus Christi)
- Reviews: 5.0 on Google

## Services

- Residential plumbing repair (leaks, toilets, water pressure, fixtures)
- Commercial plumbing repair (restaurants, retail, property managers)
- Water heater repair & installation (tank and tankless, gas and electric, often same-day)
- Gas line repair & installation (code-compliant installs, extensions, leak repair)
- Drain unclogging & repair (camera inspection before any digging)
- Bathroom remodeling (tubs, showers, vanities, full rough-ins)
- Kitchen remodeling (sinks, faucets, disposals, rough-ins)
- General service repairs

- [Home](https://pivotplumbing.biz/): overview, services, service area, reviews
- [Services](https://pivotplumbing.biz/services.html): full service list with details

- [About](https://pivotplumbing.biz/about.html): company story, owner credentials
- [Contact](https://pivotplumbing.biz/contact.html): request service, hours, after-hours rates, FAQ
